mano_cua.result_summary: 大部分基本编辑功能正常：File菜单可展开、EditorTabs显示正常、文本输入'Hello World'成功且状态栏正确更新(11字符2单词)、布局正确(菜单栏→标签栏→编辑区→状态栏)。但Edit菜单点击后无任何下拉菜单展开，属功能性缺陷
mano_cua.last_reasoning: File menu opens correctly with New/Open/Save/Print/Exit options. Edit menu does NOT open dropdown - multiple clicks show no effect (only visual highlight, no submenu). EditorTabs show 'Untitled.txt^' tab correctly. Text input works: 'Hello World' typed and displayed, status bar shows Line:1 Col:12 11chars 2words. Layout correct: MenuBar → EditorTabs → EditArea → StatusBar.
